movie.actors: Helen Hunt, Bill Paxton, Cary Elwes, Jami Gertz
movie.awards: Nominated for 2 Oscars. Another 10 wins & 15 nominations.
movie.plot: TV weatherman Bill Harding is trying to get his tornado-hunter wife, Jo, to sign divorce papers so he can marry his girlfriend Melissa. But Mother Nature, in the form of a series of intense storms sweeping across Oklahoma, has other plans. Soon the three have joined the team of stormchasers as they attempt to insert a revolutionary measuring device into the very heart of several extremely violent tornados.
movie.title: Twister
